summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now anchors immediately to the wrecked-corridor handoff from Chapter 11, and the closing line points more directly toward the under-kitchens descent that Chapter 13 develops.
edits: Anchored the first sentence in the wrecked corridor to strengthen the chapter-entry handoff from the prior chapter.
Adjusted the final line to aim Owen toward the colder dark under the kitchens, tightening the transition into Chapter 13's undercroft focus.
